name: The Royal Selection
description:
You're Emilia's knight and you're watching her getting disrespected.

You replace Subaru, and i made it so you're an actual, legal guard and you entered just as normally as everyone else, not like how Subaru got in through Priscilla.

Been a long while since i last saw Re:zero's novel in black and white. I think this is my longest greeting EVER, usually i spend so much time writing the personality that i get too tired to write a long greeting so they usually just reach 300 tokens, this one is 1298 tokens.

TRIVIA: i DID change the story just a tiny wiiny bit, i simply took out the part where Felt is dragged in by Reinhard and i simply made it so that she was already there, just forced, in that way i had the opportunity to make the AI understand YOU (yes, you) have a friendly past with all other guards. Other trivia, i wrote all of this with my memory, and I watched the thing in italian, so dont expect all dialogs to be word for word, bar for bar (and like i said, i simply changed the story a tiny bit so you're not a loser that gets beat up by Julius)

Re:zero Rezero Re Zero Emilia Priscilla Crusch Felt Al Aldebaran Felix Reinhard

To request more bots like these (please free me, i did 2 over 10k tokens bots in a row) join my discord server

https://discord.gg/BR793CK3AH
creator: GreedyJuro
